description_long: This is a small rectangular juice carton with a predominantly blue and white color scheme, featuring a prominent image of a pineapple and a wedge of pineapple on the front, indicating its flavor. The packaging is made of laminated cardboard, with a white plastic screw cap on the top for resealing. The front and sides display various product details, including the brand 'Hacendado', the product name 'Zumo de Piña Selección', and nutritional information. The carton has a slightly glossy finish, with printed text and graphics covering most surfaces. The top of the carton is folded and sealed, with the cap positioned off-center, and the bottom is flat to allow the carton to stand upright. The overall appearance is typical of single-serving juice cartons found in urban environments such as convenience stores, parks, or sidewalks.
description: A small blue and white pineapple juice carton with a plastic screw cap and detailed printed graphics, including a pineapple image and product information.
description_view_0: The back and side of the carton are visible, showing the nutritional information panel and barcode, with the cap and part of the pineapple image partially visible.
description_view_1: The front of the carton is shown, featuring the pineapple image, product name, and the white screw cap on top.
description_view_2: The side and back of the carton are visible, displaying the ingredients list, storage instructions, and the cap from a different angle.
description_view_3: The front and another side of the carton are visible, highlighting the pineapple image, product name, and a portion of the blue side panel.
